message:
fix(ci): build metal0 compiler before running node tests

The logic-table-compiler tests require the metal0 binary to be available.

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,12 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Build metal0 compiler
+        run: |
+          cd deps/metal0
+          zig build
+          echo "$PWD/zig-out/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
+
       - name: Build Zig shared library
         run: zig build lib-nodejs
